title: Basic Drop Shadow
description: Create a card with a subtle drop shadow that makes it appear elevated from the page.
hint: Use box-shadow with small positive offset-y and moderate blur.

title: Layered Elevation Shadow
description: Create a realistic elevation shadow using two shadow layers: a tight dark shadow and a soft wide shadow.
hint: Use two comma-separated shadows: first small offset/blur, second larger offset/blur with lower opacity.

title: Neon Glow Effect
description: Create a vibrant neon glow around a colored box using multiple layered shadows with increasing blur.
hint: Use 3-4 shadows all with 0 offset, increasing blur values, and a bright color.

title: Inset Pressed Effect
description: Create a pressed/concave inset shadow effect within a button element.
hint: Use the inset keyword with a dark shadow at the top and a lighter shadow at the bottom.
